scripts.dev: npm run build -w @splash/shared && concurrently -k -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @splash/server" "npm run dev -w @splash/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @splash/shared && npm run build -w @splash/client && npm run build -w @splash/server
scripts.soak: npm run build -w @splash/shared && npm run build -w @splash/server && node packages/server/dist/scripts/soak.js
